kirundi.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) yateguye harmony ya bebop mu buryo. Uburyo bwe bukoresha 6th chords aho gukoresha 7ths kandi bwongeraho diminished passing chords hagati y'ivyiciro vya scale kugira ngo ijwi riyoborwe neza.
kirundi.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: igihe co kugera kuri volume yuzuye. Decay: igihe co kumanuka kugera sustain. Sustain: urwego rwa volume rubandanya. Release: igihe co kuzima nyuma yo kurekura key.
kirundi.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale ni itsinda rya pitches ryateguwe. Modes ni ukuzunguruka kwa scale gutangura ku vyiciro bitandukanye. Buri kimwe gishiraho imyumvire itandukanye.
kirundi.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Keys zategujwe na 5ths zizamuka mu cerekezo c'isaha. Keys ziturana zisangira 6 muri 7 z'amanota. Kuja mu cerekezo c'isaha vyongera sharps; mu cerekezo kinyuranye vyongera flats.
kirundi.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Buri jwi ry'umuziki rifite overtones hejuru ya fundamental. Imbaraga zabo bijanye zigena timbre — ni yo mpamvu trumpet ivuga itandukanye na flute kuri pitch imwe.
kirundi.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval ni intera hagati ya pitches ebyiri, ipimwa muri semitones. Frequency ratio igena consonance (ratios zoroshe nka 3:2 zumvikana neza).
kirundi.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: impinduka za volume z'igihe n'igihe (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: impinduka za pitch z'igihe n'igihe (frequency modulation). Vyombi bigenzurwa na LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
kirundi.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Vyavumbuwe mu 1983. Noise burst yinjira muri delay line ngufi cane ifite feedback. Delay time igena pitch. Filter iri muri feedback loop igenzura urumuri na decay. Isa na plucked strings mu buryo busanzwe.
kirundi.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer ni igikoresho co guhanga. Buri step igereranya subdivision ya beat. Umurongo wa melody ushiraho pitched notes, drums zongeraho rythme. Musical notation yerekana ivyo ukora.
kirundi.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Sustained chord textures — igitanda kiri munsi ya hafi buri cinematic score. Gerageza iv-V-i muri minor, canke i-VI-VII ku myumvire ya Hans Zimmer. Drones muri fifths zishigikira umuziki gakondo w'Ubuhinde n'imigenzo ya bagpipe.
kirundi.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 BCE) yavumbuye consonance uva muri integer frequency ratios: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz yavyaguye mu 1862. Ijwi = compression waves; umuziki = patterns twemeye kwita nziza.
kirundi.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis ikoresha oscillator imwe (modulator) guhindura frequency y'indi (carrier) vuba. Ratio ya modulator:carrier igena harmonic content. Ratios zoroshe (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) zikora harmonic tones. Ratios zigoye zikora metallic, bell-like, canke inharmonic sounds. Yamaha DX7 yamamaje FM mu 1983.
kirundi.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw iteranya sawtooth oscillators nyinshi zadetunwe gato kuva ku zindi. Ibi bikora ijwi rinini, ryagutse, ririmurika — ikimenyetso ca EDM, trance, na pop igezweho. Voices nyinshi = rikomeye ariko rikoresha CPU nyinshi. Detuning igenzura uko voices zitanura mu tuning — detune nyinshi = ryagutse/nka chorus, gato = rikomeye/ryibanze.
kirundi.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator ikina amanota ya chord rimwe rimwe mu murongo. "Hejuru" ija kuva hasi kugera hejuru, ikora ingufu zizamuka. "Hasi" imanuka ku myumvire y'isumo. Umuvuduko ugenzura umuvuduko (gato = vuba). Gate igenzura igihe buri nota rimara rivuza (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Gerageza umuvuduko=100ms + octaves 4 + up pattern kuri classic trance arp!
kirundi.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Isa na acoustics y'icumba mu gukora echoes ntoya ibihumbi zivanga. Icumba gito = reverb ngufi, katedrali = reverb ndende.
kirundi.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Ikata peaks za waveform, ihindura sine waves zoroheje mu miterere ikomeye, ifite inguni. Ibi vyongeraho harmonics nshasha zitari mu ijwi ry'umwimerere.
kirundi.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Ikoporora signal na delay ntoya ihinduka buri gihe. Ibi bisa na voices/ibikoresho vyinshi bikina hamwe bidahuye gato.
kirundi.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Koresha headphones mu gihe co kumonitoringa kugira ngo wirinde feedback loops! Mic inyura muri effects zose zo hejuru (filter, delay, reverb, n'ibindi) — zigenge kugira ngo wumve uko buri imwe ihindura ijwi canke igikoresho cawe.
kirundi.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Huza microphone yawe kugira ngo ijwi canke igikoresho cawe kinyure muri effects chain ako kanya.
kirundi.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Raba ijwi ryawe nka waveform + frequency spectrum. Umva uko filter, delay, reverb, distortion, na chorus bihindura sound waves mu buryo bw'umubiri.
kirundi.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad ishira ahantu h'urutoki/imbeba yawe ku musical parameters ako kanya. X axis igenzura pitch (ibumoso = hasi, iburyo = hejuru). Y axis igenzura filter cutoff frequency (hejuru = urumuri, hasi = ryijimye). Ibi bisa n'ibikoresho nka Korg Kaoss Pad, cahinduye live electronic music performance mu guhindura 2D gestures mu ijwi.
kirundi.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Ibumoso–iburyo ni pitch, hejuru–hasi ni filter brightness. Koresha arrow keys kugira ngo ugende ukine nota; fyonda Escape canke Space kugira ngo uhagarare.
kirundi.tap_pads_to_place_beats: Kora pads kugira ngo ushireho beats
kirundi.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Fyonda cells kugira ngo ushireho amanota — visual melody editor
kirundi.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Progressions zisanzwe — fyonda kugira ngo wumve
kirundi.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions zikora ingendo z'amarangamutima. Chord I (tonic) yumvikana nk' 'urugo.' Chord V (dominant) ikora umuvundo ushaka gukemuka ugarutse kuri I. Chord vi (relative minor) yongeraho agahinda canke ubujakuzimu. Chord IV (subdominant) yimuka ku rugo buhoro. Bikekwa ko progression I-V-vi-IV igaragara mu birenga 70% vy'indirimbo za pop kubera ko iringaniza aya marangamutima neza.
kirundi.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Imibare y'Abaroma (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) igereranya ivyiciro vya scale. Inyuguti nini = major chord. Inyuguti nto = minor chord.
kirundi.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Fyonda melody cells muri grid yo hejuru kugira ngo urabe notation hano
kirundi.held_for_half_a_bar: Rifashwe kuri kimwe ca kabiri ca bar
kirundi.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Fyonda "Nsaba ikizamini!" kugira ngo umenyere rhythm patterns
kirundi.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Kora drum pattern muri grid yo hejuru, hanyuma ufyonde "+ Ongeraho Iriho nka Section" kugira ngo utangure kubaka indirimbo.
kirundi.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Nta beats zabitswe. Kora pattern hanyuma ufyonde Bika!
kirundi.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad ikora warm, tones zisukuye mu kuvanga sine na triangle waves. Toranya voice, fata chord muri grid yo hasi, hanyuma strum plate!
kirundi.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — kora kugira ngo utoranye, Space kugira ngo ukore strum
kirundi.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Umva, raba waveform, kandi wige inkuru ya buri gikoresho
kirundi.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Uku ni ko ibikoresho bitandukanye bibona ijwi ryabo ryihariye! Flute ni ahanini harmonic 1 (sine). Clarinet ifite odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin ifite zose. Fyonda kugira ngo wubake timbre yawe!
kirundi.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Genzura urwego rwa harmonic rwa fundamental, mid, na high. Widget ishira ijwi mu bwoko bumwe muri timbre eshanu zitandukanye. Nta score, nta gushira ahagaragara — gusa sweep hanyuma witegereze.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Iciyumviro (inyandiko yigenga): Ni urwego rwa harmonic uruhe rugena "urumuri" na "warm"?
kirundi.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Ibikoresho nyavyo bifite spectra ziranga. Genzura impamvu flute ivuga itandukanye na violin.
kirundi.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Sigura uko harmonic content igena imyumvire ya timbre.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: timbre marker y'ivyiciro 5 bitandukanye; nta acoustic fidelity score; nta gushira ahagaragara — ku bushake.
kirundi.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: hakoreshejwe amagambo yoroshe ya buri munsi n'interuro ngufi, nta jargon
kirundi.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Fyonda "Sigura" kugira ngo AI tutor asigure ico iyi view yigisha ku rwego rwo gusoma wahisemo.
